title: AI-LTC State Schema v2
description: Single Source of Truth (SSOT) for AI-LTC runtime state. All agents must read this file before making decisions. No agent may override fields outside its permission scope.

phase.description: Current lifecycle phase. Transitions must follow kernel/state_machine.yaml rules.

goal.description: The current lane's primary objective. Must not change without optimizer or human approval.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must be completed before this task can start.

qa.description: Verification criteria: how to confirm this task is truly done. Must be specific and testable.

started_at.description: When the task was moved to in_progress.

completed_at.description: When the task was marked completed.

evidence.description: Proof of completion: commit hash, CI run ID, test output, etc.

tasks.description: Current task list. Execution agents may update status; only optimizer may add/remove tasks.

related_task.description: Task ID this blocker is blocking.

resolution.description: How the blocker was resolved (if resolved).

blockers.description: Active blockers. A blocker repeating more than max_retries triggers escalation.

next_action.description: The single most important next step. Must be specific and executable.

iteration.description: Current iteration count. Incremented each bounded pass.

max_iterations.description: Maximum iterations before forced checkpoint. Configurable via ai-ltc-config.json.

status.description: Runtime status of the current batch.

authority.description: Current authority level. See kernel/control.yaml for priority chain.

last_update.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state mutation.

last_updated_by.description: Agent or role that performed the last state update.

context_summary.description: Compressed context for cheap model input. Updated at each phase transition.

error_state.description: Active error state. See kernel/error_model.yaml for error types and recovery strategies.

integrity.description: State file integrity metadata. Updated on every write.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the state file content (excluding this field).

previous_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous state version.

signed_by.description: Agent role that signed this version.

audit_trail.description: Recent state mutations for audit. Capped at 50 entries (oldest removed first).
